claim: MLflow enables custom evaluation judges that can systematically score LLM outputs against domain-specific criteria using structured metrics
actionable: Use MLflow's evaluation APIs to define custom judges that score outputs on relevance, correctness, and domain-specific dimensions
source_title: MLflow for LLM Evaluation | Custom Judges

claim: Evaluation metrics should track consistency across model outputs and validate that fine-tuned models maintain quality improvements across diverse inputs
actionable: Implement evaluation suites that test consistency and generalization, not just accuracy on specific test cases
source_title: MLflow for LLM Evaluation | Custom Judges
